prompt: Based on the understanding of the "character name" generate a unique and fully developed worldview, including scene style, cultural background, and spatial design. The composition should have an epic scale and cinematic framing. Feature the "defend-type character" as the main protagonist in a high-quality anime art style, with clear facial features and natural body proportions (not chibi). The character should be shown in a full-body composition, standing slightly forward at the center of the frame, with a confident runway-like presence and posture. The character’s outfit style, materials, and overall color palette should be automatically derived from the generated worldview, featuring a premium design aesthetic with cohesive color layering. Position an exclusive "guardian spirit beast" behind the character on the left side. The AI should automatically generate the beast so it fully aligns with both the character and the worldview. The beast must be enormous, far larger than the character, with a structurally believable design. It should appear as a hybrid of physical form and energy, with intricate textures and layered lighting effects. The guardian occupies the upper portion of the composition, creating an overwhelming sense of pressure while advancing alongside the character. The character, guardian beast, and environment must share a unified artistic style while maintaining clear color contrast to avoid visual blending. Lighting should adapt naturally to the worldview while remaining bright, clean, and cinematic with high-end animated film quality. The overall aesthetic should resemble epic anime art combined with premium AAA game key visuals, featuring ultra-high detail, high resolution, and a clean composition. Negative requirements: no additional characters, no multiple spirit beasts, no chibi or low-quality cartoon styles, no text or watermarks, no blurry faces, and no deformed anatomy or structures.
